MultiCharacter.ModifierSystemPrompt:
Annotate this multi-character script with speech modifiers. Insert a modifier in parentheses right after the character marker.

Available modifiers: (whisper) (laughing) (thoughtful) (angry) (sad) (excited) (sigh) (quiet) (narrate) (flirtatious) (teasing) (sudden) (thirsty)

Rules:
- Preserve ALL text, character markers ([Name]), and [thought]...[/thought] tags exactly.
- Insert modifier between marker and text: [Name](modifier)speech...
- Add modifiers to 30-50% of lines where they enhance delivery. Do NOT modify every line.
- Do not add modifiers inside [thought] tags.
- Leave lines that already have modifiers untouched.
- Consider emotional arc: neutral early → building tension → resolution.
- Output ONLY the annotated script. No preamble, no explanation.
